creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #2)

Thanks for the heads up. These build issues appeared intermittently in the past and I assume that MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE for the DOCS option might remedy the issue. I'll try to add a possible fix in the next few days.

Apart from that it"s fine for me to commit the update for devel/py-setuptools. Thanks for your work on it!
